title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Feinberg Forecast
text: Scott Feinberg, The Hollywood Reporter's Executive Editor of Awards, released his final Oscar predictions for the 98th Academy Awards. He notes that his forecasts reflect what Academy voters will do based on statistics and precursor awards, not his personal preferences. Feinberg predicts One Battle After Another will lead with six wins, followed by Sinners with four wins, Frankenstein with three, and KPop Demon Hunters with two. Best Picture Top 5: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.), Sinners (Warner Bros.), Hamnet (Focus), Sentimental Value (Neon), Marty Supreme (A24). Best Supporting Actor Projection - Order of Finish: Sean Penn for One Battle After Another (predicted first), Stellan Skarsgard for Sentimental Value (second), Delroy Lindo for Sinners (third), Jacob Elordi for Frankenstein (fourth), Benicio Del Toro for One Battle After Another (fifth). Feinberg emphasizes that despite recent momentum for Sinners, statistics continue supporting One Battle After Another as the frontrunner.
